text: Being here, I feel intellectually invigorated and somewhat detached. The glass walls and organized seating suggest a space dedicated to collaboration and inquiry, while the bright, abstract panels in the exhibit area arouse a sense of curiosity. Yet, the sterility and formality of this environment also evoke an undercurrent of isolation, as though thought and observation are partitioned from spontaneous, lived experience. I am present both as an observer and as a participant in the ongoing dialogue between knowledge and its display.
